canonical_gates.finding: Runway is correctly modeled as a hard gate and now has a redacted receipt contract, but current receipt status is not_provided. Launch remains blocked until a months-only receipt proves 18+ months before sub #1 and later 24+ months before sub #4.

mobile-eats has strong product/substrate evidence, but no named signed owner-operator plus first paying-customer registry receipt was located. It should not be counted as a formed portfolio company under the goal's vanity-metric forbid until that registry row exists.

The client-talk/community/field-trip source provenance plus 5 documented prospect-interview gate is now machine-checkable. Current ledger validates structurally but blocks formation cash because no candidate has qualified source evidence plus five qualified would-buy interviews with medium-or-strong urgency and evidence refs.

The anti-pitch voice gate is now machine-checkable. Current ledger blocks public-clear status because zeststream-v2-fresh still contains workflow-builder and automation-positioning hits and does not yet carry the sharpen-legacy/incubate-new holding-company story.

The Yuzu owner-operator voice gate is now machine-checkable separately from ZestStream anti-pitch voice. Mobile Eats has brand/public-surface evidence, but no signed owner-operator voice capture, community context, or Yuzu review receipt.

The public story is now machine-checkable separately from anti-pitch voice. Current ledger blocks public-clear status because zeststream-v2-fresh lacks proof/receipt refs and still carries workflow-builder or automation-shop framing.

The future nonprofit/social-cause extension is now machine-checkable. Current ledger treats it as deferred and blocks readiness because no social-cause scope, nonprofit legal review, governance model, operating-separation, funding policy, or public-story receipts exist.

The company close/pivot/graduation path is now machine-checkable separately from the standing holding-plane goal. Current ledger tracks Mobile Eats only as a baseline and blocks any lifecycle disposition claim until owner/operator, customer-obligation, financial, substrate-retention, and brand/public-update receipts exist.

The 60h/week Year 2 ceiling and 50%+ substrate time-offset invariant are now machine-checkable. Current ledger validates structurally but blocks sustainable-pace claims because weekly hours and substrate coaching-time offset are not measured.

Warm-network-only sourcing for subs #1-2 is now machine-checkable. Current ledger validates structurally but blocks sub #1 owner search because no warm-network source proof exists, and public/cold sourcing is rejected before sub #3.

The substrate is real: mobile-eats has tenant routing, a baseline substrate-share receipt with 27 total @zeststream/* dependencies, and SkillOS records real pack adoption across three consumer repos. The missing part is a formed owner/company registry row.

The full NURTURE stack is now machine-checkable separately from package adoption. Mobile Eats has flywheel and @zeststream/* package evidence, but the JSM component is missing and SkillOS plus brand voice are only partial, so shared-stack clear remains blocked.

POUR readiness is now machine-checkable. Mobile Eats has brand, repo, public-surface, and substrate proof, but launch clear remains blocked because first paying-customer, owner-operator, and operating-control handoff receipts are absent.

Owner economics are now machine-checkable. Mobile Eats has no signed owner-operator, cap-table, distribution terms, or legal review receipts proving 25% owner equity and tiered 45-75% owner profit distributions.

NURTURE peer-coach eligibility is now machine-checkable. Mobile Eats has no signed owner/operator, no Tier 2 status, no sustainable cash receipt, and no 5% peer-coach equity grant, so no owner can peer-coach a new sub yet.

Legal house scaffold exists and the required sub #2 signing gates are now machine-checkable. Current ledger blocks sub #2 owner signing because no binding artifact, attorney review, or CPA review refs are present for operating agreement, peer-coach, annual review, substrate pool, subsidiary owner agreement, and intercompany services terms.
Reusable substrate and a baseline launch economics ledger exist, but there is still no second comparable launch row proving PEEL or PRESS N+1 is cheaper than N.

The RECYCLE loop is now machine-checkable separately from N+1 economics. Mobile Eats has package-reuse evidence, but no friction row has landed as a SkillOS capability plus package/substrate upgrade and portfolio propagation receipt.

recent_progress_claims.claim: 4000+ commits in 7 days across 9 product surfaces
recent_progress_claims.finding: The replayable progress-velocity ledger blocks the claim: the sampled nine local repos total 3755 commits for the fixed 2026-05-10T06:46Z to 2026-05-17T06:46Z window, the exact intended nine product surfaces were not established, and agent-bench has zero commits in that window.
Share-ready packet, tenant declaration, and @zeststream/* dependencies are present. First paying-customer and signed owner-operator registry receipts were not located.

recent_progress_claims.claim: anthropic-sdk-python adoption OK across three consumer repos
recent_progress_claims.finding: canonical-gates-status records package-adoption-velocity OK with real consumer repos agent-bench, mobile-eats, and zesttube.

The skill exists with banned words, grounding rules, and scorer gates. Its current canonical line is still the older SMB time-back positioning, so it needs a holding-company alignment update before it enforces the new anti-pitch rule.

recent_progress_claims.claim: SkillOS Forever-OS v3 ratified and structure locked
recent_progress_claims.finding: The v3 goal file and session arc receipts exist under Desktop goals and SkillOS state.

next_actions.action: Create a portfolio-company registry schema that refuses to count a company without signed owner-operator and first paying-customer receipt paths.
Populate state/holding-company-runway-current.json with a months-only redacted runway receipt proving the 18-month sub #1 launch gate, or keep launch blocked.
Use state/holding-company-anti-pitch-voice.json to drive rewrite/removal of builder-framed surfaces and then update the JSM-managed voice skill through its approved workflow.
Inventory and grade public surfaces against the mission-alignment goal; route D/F surfaces to update plans.
Fill state/holding-company-owner-voice.json with owner voice, community context, Yuzu review, owner-operator, and public-surface refs before marking any company surface owner-voice clear.
Fill state/holding-company-public-story.json with receipt/proof refs and holding-company positioning after removing build-app/workflow-builder framing from public surfaces.

Fill state/holding-company-nonprofit-extension.json with social-cause scope, nonprofit legal review, governance, operating-separation, funding policy, and public-story receipts before marking any nonprofit extension ready or active.

Fill state/holding-company-lifecycle-disposition.json with owner/operator, customer-obligation, financial, substrate-retention, brand/public-update, and continuity receipts before marking any portfolio company closed, pivoted, or graduated.

If mobile-eats is intended as portfolio company #1, add owner-operator, equity, first paying-customer, and operating-control handoff receipts; otherwise keep it classified as product/substrate proof, not a counted company.
Fill state/holding-company-shared-stack.json with present receipt refs for SkillOS, flywheel, JSM, @zeststream/* packages, and brand voice before marking Mobile Eats shared-stack clear.

Fill state/holding-company-peel-interviews.json with client-talk, community, or field-trip source evidence plus five qualified prospect interviews before clearing or committing formation cash for any candidate.
Fill state/holding-company-owner-search-phasing.json with warm-network source proof before allowing or signing an owner for sub #1 or sub #2.
Fill state/holding-company-sustainable-pace.json with measured weekly hours and substrate coaching-time offset before claiming sustainable pace for any Year 2+ company period.
Fill state/holding-company-legal-structure.json with binding artifact refs plus attorney and CPA review receipts before signing a sub #2 owner.
Fill state/holding-company-pour-readiness.json with first paying-customer, owner-operator, and operating-control handoff receipts before marking Mobile Eats POUR clear.

Fill state/holding-company-owner-economics.json with signed owner-operator, cap-table, distribution terms, legal review, and substrate-share refs proving 25% owner equity and 45-75% tiered owner distributions before marking a deal signed or active.
Fill state/holding-company-peer-coach.json with Tier 2+ owner, sustainable cash, operating-control, peer-coach agreement, and 5% equity grant receipts before marking any owner eligible to peer-coach.
Populate the launch economics ledger with per-launch PEEL interviews, PRESS build hours, reused package count, new substrate contributions, and downstream propagation window as new companies form.
Establish the exact nine product-surface set and rerun state/holding-company-progress-velocity.json before using the 4000+ commits in 7 days velocity claim in public or gate summaries.
Fill state/holding-company-recycle-loop.json when launch friction appears, then attach SkillOS capability, package/substrate, and portfolio propagation receipts within the configured window.
